events.content: Read issue #2662: retire deprecated incoherence skill (absorbed by doc-accuracy)
Found script lives at .claude/skills/incoherence/scripts/incoherence.py, not scripts/incoherence.py as issue assumed; no live invoker references it outside the skill bundle
Relocated incoherence.py to scripts/incoherence.py via git mv to preserve runnability per issue acceptance (scripts/incoherence.py still runnable)
Deleted canonical .claude/skills/incoherence/ (SKILL.md, references/DEVELOPMENT.md) and generated mirror src/copilot-cli/skills/incoherence/
Repointed validation-authority SKILL.md Related-Skills row from incoherence to doc-accuracy (canonical + regenerated copilot mirror)
Removed dead 'incoherence' category keyword from scripts/skill_registry.py (orphaned after skill deletion)
Bumped plugin.json 0.5.207 -> 0.5.208 for both project-toolkit manifests (.claude + src/copilot-cli) per #2118
Verified scripts/incoherence.py runs: step 1/22 DETECTION PARENT output, exit 0

Validators: orphan-ref 49 findings (== baseline, zero incoherence; single-word name invisible to SKILL_REF_RE which requires a hyphen); marketplace count_claim findings zero; agent drift unchanged pre/post (11 pre-existing, none incoherence); plugin version bump PASS

Test evidence: uv run python -m pytest tests/ -k 'skill_registry or registry' -> 62 passed, 12848 deselected. pre_pr.py 24 passed (Plugin Version Bump passed, Agent Drift Detection passed, Markdown Linting passed). scripts/incoherence.py smoke run passed (exit 0).
